channel.title: Welcome on Kevin Y. Lin
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome on Kevin Y. Lin

item.title: Paper Summary: Quantum-limit Chern Topological Magnetism in TbMn6Sn6
item.description: A structured reading note on quantum-limit Chern topological magnetism in TbMn6Sn6, focusing on Dirac fermions, Chern gaps, edge states, and Berry-curvature transport.

item.title: Munkres Manifolds Derivations
item.description: A short derivation-style note on why Munkres’ definition of a boundaryless manifold excludes half-space charts.

item.title: About
item.description: About Kevin Y. Lin, the research focus behind this site, and the writing standards for the notebook.

item.title: Now
item.description: Current reading tracks, active questions, and the working stack behind the notebook.

item.title: Research
item.description: A map of the questions, methods, and notes that organize my work in quantum materials, topology, and inference.
